summary: Verified Home refactor (Home.jsx → RevealStage.jsx + homeFateCard.js extraction). All core roulette/reveal flows work identically with ZERO regressions. Tested: guided-skip → ZIP entry → Food mode → Deal → result card renders with name/cuisine/price/rating/distance → respin swaps pick → alternative click swaps pick → favorite toggle → 'Share as image' (buildFateCard) successfully generated and downloaded PNG with NO console/page errors → 'Share your fate' works → reset returns to 'Your table awaits' empty state → header Champions link navigates to /leaderboard → theme switch (dark) + subsequent deal still renders result card → themed 'Share as image' path also generates PNG → Pub Crawl mode toggles without crashes. Zero JS/pageerrors detected during all interactions.
critical_code_review_comments: Pre-existing (not from this refactor): https://ipapi.co/latitude/ CORS error on initial load — non-blocking but pollutes console. Consider a server-side proxy or removing the client-side ipapi call.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor of Home.jsx into RevealStage.jsx + homeFateCard.js verified clean. Data-testids preserved. buildFateCard import path from '../../pages/homeFateCard' works. Guided flow modal appears on first load — use [data-testid="guided-skip"] to dismiss. Result card testid: spin-result-card. All action buttons functional.
